changelog:
• Implemented CSS exit fail-safe class and pointer-events none target rule to fix Chordex-to-Hub returning black screens.
• Added 3D GPU layer promotion to invalidate WebView compositor hit-testing and align landscape scene touches instantly.
• Enlarged concentric touch targets for add/close buttons to 44x44px and optimized scenes bar CSS.
• Exposed hit-testing debug outlines and enhanced Developer Tools diagnostic reports.
whatsNew:
• Implemented CSS exit fail-safe class and pointer-events none target rule to fix Chordex-to-Hub returning black screens.
• Added 3D GPU layer promotion to invalidate WebView compositor hit-testing and align landscape scene touches instantly.

added: Exposed Stagex scene hit-testing debug outline mode under Developer Tools.
fixed: Implemented CSS exit fail-safe and pointer-events rule to resolve Hub return black screen.
Promoted Stagex iframe to 3D GPU layer in landscape mode to synchronize WebView hit-testing boundaries instantly.
Enlarged transparent concentric border hitboxes of close and add buttons to a full 44x44px standard target.
